title: mellow cheesy kenyan paneer grill
description: a pungent, cheese-pull, lazy-sunday kenyan dish featuring paneer and binchotan charcoal that's dash-friendly
instructions: preheat binchotan charcoal grill to medium-high heat.
heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a pan over medium heat and add 1 small onion, diced.
once the onion is translucent, add 2 cloves of minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
add 250g paneer cubes to the pan and cook until they start to brown, about 5 minutes.
remove the paneer from the pan and set aside.
add another 2 tablespoons of oil to the pan and add 1 teaspoon of marinade mix, cook for 1 minute.
return the paneer to the pan and stir in 1 cup of shredded mozzarella cheese and 1/2 cup of grated parmesan cheese.
cook until the cheese is melted and bubbly, about 3-4 minutes.
remove from heat and let rest for 2 minutes before serving.
